smg.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Mist at first. One or two showers. Light winds, becoming force 2 to 3 south to southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds, occasionally force 5.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, becoming northerlies with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds.
